title: P-first symplectic Euler preserves a modified quadratic invariant along an orbit

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: If real-valued sequences q and p satisfy the p-first symplectic Euler recurrence, then for every natural number n, the modified quadratic invariant p_n^2 + omega^2 q_n^2 - dt omega^2 q_n p_n equals its initial value at n = 0.
informal.latex: Let \(q,p:\mathbb{N}\to\mathbb{R}\) satisfy \(p_{n+1}=p_n-\Delta t\,\omega^2q_n\) and \(q_{n+1}=q_n+\Delta t\,p_{n+1}\). Then for every \(n\in\mathbb{N}\), \(p_n^2+\omega^2q_n^2-\Delta t\,\omega^2q_np_n=p_0^2+\omega^2q_0^2-\Delta t\,\omega^2q_0p_0\).
assumptions: omega and dt are real numbers
q and p are real-valued sequences indexed by natural numbers
q and p satisfy the p-first symplectic Euler recurrence for every natural-number index
informal.expected_conclusion: The modified quadratic invariant is constant along the indexed p-first symplectic Euler orbit.

declarations.name: symplecticEulerPNext
declarations.statement: def symplecticEulerPNext (omega dt q p : ℝ) : ℝ := p - dt * omega ^ 2 * q

declarations.name: symplecticEulerQNext
declarations.statement: def symplecticEulerQNext (omega dt q p : ℝ) : ℝ := q + dt * symplecticEulerPNext omega dt q p

declarations.name: symplecticEulerInvariant
declarations.statement: def symplecticEulerInvariant (omega dt q p : ℝ) : ℝ := p ^ 2 + omega ^ 2 * q ^ 2 - dt * omega ^ 2 * q * p

declarations.name: IsSymplecticEulerOrbit
declarations.statement: def IsSymplecticEulerOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (q p : ℕ → ℝ) : Prop := ∀ n : ℕ, p (n + 1) = symplecticEulerPNext omega dt (q n) (p n) ∧ q (n + 1) = symplecticEulerQNext omega dt (q n) (p n)

declarations.name: symplecticEulerInvariant_const_of_isSymplecticEulerOrbit
declarations.statement: theorem symplecticEulerInvariant_const_of_isSymplecticEulerOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (q p : ℕ → ℝ) (hqp : IsSymplecticEulerOrbit omega dt q p) : ∀ n : ℕ, symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q n) (p n) = symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q 0) (p 0)

tasks.input: Translate the informal sequence-level symplectic Euler invariant statement into a Lean 4 theorem statement.
tasks.target: theorem symplecticEulerInvariant_const_of_isSymplecticEulerOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (q p : ℕ → ℝ) (hqp : IsSymplecticEulerOrbit omega dt q p) : ∀ n : ℕ, symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q n) (p n) = symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q 0) (p 0)

tasks.input: Given the formal declarations and theorem statement, complete the Lean 4 proof.
tasks.target: A proof using the adjacent-step invariant theorem and induction on n.
